chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 193 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2160/2025 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2161/2025 27.01.2026 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Fahad, advocate for respondent On the last date following order was passed: “Learned counsel for respondent points out that the impugned order is no longer in the field and the same has been countermand at the instance of applicant. Learned counsel for applicant seeks time to obtain instructions. At his request to come up tomorrow i.e. 27.01.2026” Today learned counsel for the applicant confirms the position. In view hereof this reference application is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
